comment.body: My take from this is Long-vol trade will not materialize in this window Feb. vol would get crushed, and then would have to monitor hedging positioning for March OPEX and VIX Expiry. And if conditions are met, traders could try that long-vol trade again. March OPEX is Qtr OPEX and size of OI is large (JPM collar, etc, etc). So good chance here specially if rally is hard and pronounced (blow-off ish top). Need complacency, meme stocks rallying, crypto bouncing back, Put writing strong, no one hedging  because "VIX is a scam product and will never work" (Cem going on about "equity vol will not work as well as other assets vol"), people tired of losing with hedges (they are hedges not lottery tickets). Then conditions ripe for long-vol. Take a shot and see if sticks.
